MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 922-5939, specially appearing for Plaintiff, and moving party; Howard M. Olsen, Attorney at Law, (415) 931-4207, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.
Counsel submit to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for Summary Judgment denied. Triable issue of fact regarding what amount, if any, is due.
